review_decision.summary: T1-B successfully implements structured logging and exception handling while maintaining fail-closed semantics

findings.criterion: 真正增加了日志，而不是只改字符串
evidence: log_structured() writes JSON logs with timestamp, event_type, execution_id
8 event types cover all scenarios (start, check, complete, errors)

findings.verdict: PASS - Default status is FAIL, exceptions re-raised
evidence: Line 226: result initialized with status='FAIL' (fail-closed default)
Line 267: Path not found returns FAIL immediately
Line 506: Exit code 0 only for PASS, 1 for all other cases

findings.criterion: 是否遗漏异常上下文（错误、路径、栈）
findings.verdict: PASS - Complete context captured for all exceptions

strengths: TypedDict extended with new fields (execution_id, log_file, exception_details)
Individual item exceptions caught but don't stop validation
Global exception catch-all prevents silent crashes
observations: Log file rotation: Daily (YYYYMMDD) - adequate for current scale
UUID generation: Automatic if not provided - good traceability
Error codes added: VALIDATOR_CRASH, PATH_ACCESS_ERROR, UNEXPECTED_ERROR

cases.handling: Line 313-339: Caught, logged as item_check_failed, treated as missing
Line 372-399: Caught, logged as validator_crash, returns FAIL

no_silent_success_on_exception.verification: All exception paths lead to status='FAIL'

no_exception_downgrade.verification: Exceptions caught but status never changes to PASS on error

evidence_refs_present.verification: T1-B_evidence_ref.md provides line numbers for all key points

final_verdict.summary: T1-B delivery validation observability enhancement is complete and meets all requirements
recommendations: Consider log rotation policy for long-running deployments
Consider adding execution_id to all output formats for consistency

signoff.signature: ALLOW - T1-B meets all completion criteria with proper observability
